items.title: Bam-Herro Altercation, Wemby's Deal, Bron's Next Move, Lowry Retires

author.display_name: Danny Green x Inside the Green Room

items.body_excerpt: Inside the Green Room is back and we're breaking down everything happening around the NBA. We dive into the reported physical altercation between Bam Adebayo and Tyler Herro during NBA Summer League in Las Vegas, Victor Wembanyama's new contract extension, the latest on LeBron…
